mapper.select: SELECT OGHU.GATE_CD , OGHU.GATE_CD AS GATE_CD_ORI , GATE_NM , GATE_NM_ENG , OGHU.DEL_FLAG , OGHU.GMT_CD , (REG_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS REG_DATE , GETUSERNAME(OGHU.GATE_CD, OGHU.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM FROM STOCOGHU OGHU WHERE OGHU.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY OGHU.GATE_CD

SELECT OGHU.REG_USER_ID , OGHU.GATE_CD , OGHU.GATE_CD AS GATE_CD_ORI , GATE_NM , GATE_NM_ENG , OGHU.DEL_FLAG , OGHU.GMT_CD , 'U' AS INSERT_FLAG , (REG_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS REG_DATE , GETUSERNAME(OGHU.GATE_CD, OGHU.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM FROM STOCOGHU OGHU WHERE OGHU.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND GATE_CD = #{GATE_CD}
